nasb.text: When he saw that it pleased the Jews, he proceeded to arrest Peter also. Now it was during the days of Unleavened Bread.

esv.text: and when he saw that it pleased the Jews, he proceeded to arrest Peter also. This was during the days of Unleavened Bread.

cnv.text: 他見這事博得了猶太人的歡心，就在除酵節期間，再次捉拿彼得。

ccb.text: 他见这样做能取悦犹太人，便又在除酵节期间拘捕了彼得，

csbs.text: 他见这事使犹太人高兴，就又去抓彼得；那时正是除酵节期间。
